pain_point: Manual extraction of data from complex client financial documents and K-1s for closely-held businesses and high-net-worth individuals.
draft_email: I noticed on your website that Hagen, Kurth, Perman & Co. has a dedicated focus on serving closely-held businesses and high-net-worth individuals in the Seattle area. As your tax and advisory practices support these complex entities, your team likely spends countless billable hours manually extracting data from unstructured client financial documents and K-1s. Our Universal Document Analysis platform can automatically ingest and structure data from any client document, completely eliminating manual entry so your CPAs can focus entirely on strategic advisory.
